item.title: First responders are the best people on earthвҖҰ thank you for w...
item.description:
View on Instagram


First responders are the best people on earthвҖҰ thank you for what you do. itвҖҷs been an honour meeting you guys. рҹҡЁ #lastrong If you have a following: Do fucking better, influence people for the better. ItвҖҷs not just about you.. itвҖҷs bigger than you. #california #californialove #firstresponders #palisade #malibu #firefighter #firefighters #lawenforcement #lafires #californiafires #influncer #giveback #dobetter #burgers

item.title: IвҖҷm incredibly grateful for being able to do what I do, and wo...
item.description:
View on Instagram


IвҖҷm incredibly grateful for being able to do what I do, and wouldnвҖҷt possible without you guys watching my videos, IвҖҷm even more grateful for every first responder and person working tirelessly to fight these fires. рҹҡЁрҹ‘®рҹҸјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ§‘рҹҸјвҖҚрҹҡ’ItвҖҷs not just about handing out burgers or a meal, but about showing up and putting a fucking smile on these heroesвҖҷ faces, even if itвҖҷs just for a minute. TheyвҖҷre giving everything to protect our community. TO OTHER CONTENT CREATORS AND PEOPLE WITH A FOLLOWING: if you arenвҖҷt posting about whatвҖҷs going on in your communities, and only pushing your content or products.. you should be fucking embarrassed. Step upвҖҰ. DonвҖҷt just sit back and post about meaningless shit. #california #californiafires #palisades #malibu #wildfires #firstresponders #firefighter #firefighters #losangeles #lafires

item.title: To all the first responders fighting these firesвҖ”some of you h...
item.description:
View on Instagram


To all the first responders fighting these firesвҖ”some of you havenвҖҷt fucking slept in days, yet you still show up, exhausted, relentless and working around the clock.YouвҖҷre not out here for the вҖңthanksвҖқ but you fucking deserve it. Thank you for all that you do. First responders are some of the most selfless people IвҖҷve met in my fucking life.рҹ‘®рҹҸјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ§‘рҹҸјвҖҚрҹҡ’рҹҡЁ To anyone that has a platform, a voice, a following: Stop posting only about yourself. If youвҖҷve got a platform, use it to actually help. Fuck the vanityвҖ”do better, raise awareness, and show up for something bigger than you. This is all bigger than social media, build a better community, build something special. Whatever you see on social media about these fires, itвҖҷs worse in person. IвҖҷm not saying that to be pessimistic, itвҖҷs just the reality. If you can help, thereвҖҷs a link in my bio. If you canвҖҷt help, thatвҖҷs okay. But if you can, do it. #california #californiafires #firefighters #firefighter #firstresponders #malibu #eatoncanyon #altadena #palisades #losangeles #wildfires #sunsetblvd #hollywood

item.title: This video isnвҖҷt really about food, and IвҖҷm not here to dive...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This video isnвҖҷt really about food, and IвҖҷm not here to dive into the politics of how the governor has вҖңfucked it up.вҖқ Instead, I want to highlight the incredible first responders. рҹҡЁ Last night, I had the honor of speaking to hundreds of them. Every single one of them has been working for days without sleep. You could see the exhaustion on their facesвҖ”covered in smoke and ashes, with tears in their eyes. WhatвҖҷs happening in California right now is absolutely devastating. Families are losing their homes, the places theyвҖҷve built their lives, shared memories and dreamed of their futures..You donвҖҷt have to be an influencer or a celebrity to make a difference. If youвҖҷd like to help, you can check the link in my bio. There are endless ways you can help. To every first responder out there: thank you. Keep doing what you do. California has your back. The world has your back. Your courage and sacrifice mean everything. вҷҘпёҸрҹҡ’рҹ‘®рҹҸјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ #californiafires #firstresponders #palisades #pacificpalisades #losangeles #californiafires #california #lafd
